title: Super Secret Doors
description: Secret doors!  Doors that look like other blocks and therefore aren't immediately apparent!
body:
Secret doors!  Doors that look like other blocks and therefore aren't immediately apparent! Can be used for secret bases, secret rooms, or because you just really want a door that looks like polished granite for some reason…

Thus far, doors (and trapdoors!) for:
- all vanilla planks
- all vanilla logs
- stone, cobblestone, stone bricks, and deepslate variations
- netherrack and netherbrick
- andesite, diorite, and granite, including polished variations
- blackstone and polished blackstone
- polished basalt
- vanilla bookshelf
- and more!

------

## Official Addons:
Biomes O'Plenty: [Secret BOP Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/secret-bop-doors)

Oh The Biomes You'll Go: [Secret BYG Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/secret-byg-doors)

Celestial Exploration: [Secret CE Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/secret-ce-doors)

Regions Unexplored: [Secret RU Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/secret-ru-doors)
